questions.question: What is the purpose of erosion in morphological algorithms? (2-3 marks)
expectedPoints: Erosion is used to shrink an object by removing pixels from its boundary.

questions.question: Explain the difference between opening and closing in morphological algorithms. (5-10 marks)
expectedPoints: Opening is used to remove noise and other unwanted features from an image.
Closing is used to fill in holes and other gaps in an image.
